Claude vs GitHub Copilot (2026): Which Should You Use?

Claude and GitHub Copilot are both popular tools in the AI Coding Assistants space. Here's how they compare.

ClaudeGitHub Copilot
MakerAnthropicGitHub (Microsoft)
PricingFree plan available; Pro $20/mo; Max plans from $100/moFree tier for individuals; paid plans from $10/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forLong-document analysis, coding, and nuanced writing tasks.Developers wanting inline autocomplete directly in their IDE.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.
